subject: Pull request merged
preview: Your branch has been merged to main.
body_html: Your GitHub pull request has been merged.

subject: Action Required: Verify Your Identity to Maintain Account Access
preview: To ensure safety, your account requires identity verification.
body_html:
Hello,

To ensure the safety and security of the Uber marketplace, we are introducing mandatory identity verification for all users. Our records show that your account requires completion of this check.

Required Action: Complete the identity verification form by April 1. Failure to do so will result in temporary suspension of your Uber and Uber Eats apps.

Verify Identity Now

subject: Agenda: Product sync
body_html: You have an event tomorrow at 9:00 AM.
